## Scrub checklist

- [ ] No API tokens, credentials, or `.env` values in the diff
- [ ] No customer PII (names, emails, domains) in committed files
- [ ] `data/outputs/` files are gitignored and not staged
- [ ] `out/` and `assets/` generated files are not staged
